title: BJP Eyes Assam Hat-Trick, Three-Way Contest In Kerala High-Stake Polls
description: Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry kickstarted the 2026 election cycle this morning. The BJP is bidding for an Assam hat-trick, while Kerala's Left front wants a fifth straight term. N Rangaswamy's AINRC is plotting a fourth win in five Puducherry polls.
